Class Account

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.domain.model.Account
public class Account extends Object
Core domain entity representing a bank account.

This is a pure Java domain object with no framework annotations. All persistence mapping is handled in the infrastructure layer via a dedicated JPA entity adapter, keeping the domain free from infrastructure concerns (Hexagonal Architecture).

Optimistic concurrency control is enforced through the version field, which maps to a @Version-annotated column in the JPA adapter. This prevents lost-update anomalies when two concurrent transfer requests target the same account.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Money
    balance
    Current available balance; always uses Money.SCALE decimal places.
    private final Instant
    createdAt
    Timestamp at which the account record was first created.
    private final Currency
    currency
    ISO 4217 currency in which this account is denominated.
    private final UUID
    customerId
    Reference to the customer who owns this account.
    private final UUID
    id
    Unique surrogate identifier for this account.
    private AccountStatus
    status
    Lifecycle state of this account.
    private Instant
    updatedAt
    Timestamp of the most recent modification to this account.
    private Long
    version
    Optimistic locking token.

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    block()
    Blocks this account, preventing any further debit or credit operations.

    Credits this account by adding the specified amount to the balance.

    Debits this account by subtracting the specified amount from the balance.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private final UUID id
      Unique surrogate identifier for this account.

    • customerId

      private final UUID customerId
      Reference to the customer who owns this account.

    • balance

      private Money balance
      Current available balance; always uses Money.SCALE decimal places.

    • currency

      private final Currency currency
      ISO 4217 currency in which this account is denominated.

    • status

      private AccountStatus status
      Lifecycle state of this account.

    • version

      private Long version
      Optimistic locking token. Incremented by the persistence layer on each update. A null value indicates the entity has never been persisted.

    • createdAt

      private final Instant createdAt
      Timestamp at which the account record was first created.

    • updatedAt

      private Instant updatedAt
      Timestamp of the most recent modification to this account.

  • Constructor Details

    • Account

      public Account(UUID id, UUID customerId, Money balance, Currency currency, AccountStatus status, Long version, Instant createdAt, Instant updatedAt)
      Constructs an Account with all fields supplied, typically used when reconstituting an entity from the persistence layer.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique account identifier
      customerId - the owning customer identifier
      balance - the current balance
      currency - the account currency
      status - the current account status
      version - the optimistic lock version
      createdAt - the creation timestamp
      updatedAt - the last-updated timestamp

  • Method Details

    • open

      public static Account open(UUID customerId, BigDecimal initialBalance, String currencyCode)
      Factory method for creating a brand-new account with an initial balance.

      The resulting account is in AccountStatus.ACTIVE state with a null version (not yet persisted) and the current time as both createdAt and updatedAt.

      Parameters:
      customerId - the owning customer identifier
      initialBalance - the opening balance (must be non-negative)
      currencyCode - the ISO 4217 currency code
      Returns:
      a new, unpersisted Account instance

    • credit

      public void credit(Money amount)
      Credits this account by adding the specified amount to the balance.
      Parameters:
      amount - the positive amount to add
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the account is not AccountStatus.ACTIVE
      IllegalArgumentException - if currencies differ or the amount is negative

    • debit

      public void debit(Money amount)
      Debits this account by subtracting the specified amount from the balance.
      Parameters:
      amount - the positive amount to subtract
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the account is not AccountStatus.ACTIVE
      IllegalArgumentException - if currencies differ, the amount is negative, or the balance is insufficient

    • block

      public void block()
      Blocks this account, preventing any further debit or credit operations.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the account is already blocked

    • ensureActive

      private void ensureActive()
      Ensures this account is currently in AccountStatus.ACTIVE state.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the account is blocked

    • getId

      public UUID getId()
      Returns the unique account identifier.
      Returns:
      the account UUID

    • getCustomerId

      public UUID getCustomerId()
      Returns the owning customer identifier.
      Returns:
      the customer UUID

    • getBalance

      public Money getBalance()
      Returns the current balance.
      Returns:
      the current Money balance

    • getCurrency

      public Currency getCurrency()
      Returns the account currency.
      Returns:
      the ISO 4217 Currency

    • getStatus

      public AccountStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current account status.
      Returns:
      the AccountStatus

    • getVersion

      public Long getVersion()
      Returns the optimistic lock version.
      Returns:
      the version token, or null if not yet persisted

    • getCreatedAt

      public Instant getCreatedAt()
      Returns the account creation timestamp.
      Returns:
      the creation Instant

    • getUpdatedAt

      public Instant getUpdatedAt()
      Returns the last-updated timestamp.
      Returns:
      the last-updated Instant
